fault_hypothesis: The calculation of the mean on line 71 is incorrect. It divides the total by the requested `window` size instead of the actual number of samples in `recent`, which can be smaller if there is insufficient data.

constraints.intent: The number of recent samples must equal the window size, unless the warmup threshold has not been met.
If an average is returned, it must have been computed over a full window of data.
The computed mean must be the correct average of recent samples, unless it is discarded due to the warmup threshold.
